title: ATDD prompt violated: acceptance tests use back-door DB access
evidence: test_app.py imports `db, Book` from app and seeds fixtures via `db.session.add(Book(...))` in 6 of 11 tests (test_get_all_books:65-69, test_get_books_by_author:79-85, test_get_single_book:97-99, test_update_book:116-118, test_update_book_missing_required_fields:141-143, test_delete_book:161-163). The ATDD prompt requires exercising the SUT ONLY through its public HTTP interface with no back-door access to internals or the database.
suggestion: Arrange test state by POSTing books through the API instead of inserting rows directly, so each scenario touches only the public REST contract.

title: 404 responses are HTML, not JSON
evidence: app.py:81,87,109 use `Book.query.get_or_404(...)`, which returns Flask's default HTML error page for missing resources; tests only assert status_code (test_get_nonexistent_book:108-111, test_delete_nonexistent_book:170-173) so the non-JSON body is unverified. R8 asks for JSON responses with appropriate status codes.
suggestion: Register a JSON 404 error handler or return `jsonify({'error': 'Book not found'}), 404` explicitly instead of get_or_404.

title: No pinned dependency manifest
evidence: No requirements.txt or pyproject.toml in run_dir; flask and flask-sqlalchemy are only mentioned in README.md:26 as a `pip install` line, so versions are unpinned.
suggestion: Add a requirements.txt pinning flask and flask-sqlalchemy for reproducible setup.

title: Deprecated datetime.utcnow used
evidence: app.py:18-19 use `datetime.utcnow` as SQLAlchemy column defaults; utcnow is deprecated in Python 3.12+ (use timezone-aware datetime.now(timezone.utc)). Idiomatic score 0.58 (.idiomatic_cache.json).

title: Dev server runs with debug=True
evidence: app.py:121 and run.py:10 call `app.run(debug=True, host='0.0.0.0', port=5000)`, exposing the Werkzeug debugger on all interfaces.
suggestion: Gate debug on an env var and default to False for non-development use.

title: created_at/updated_at timestamps beyond spec
evidence: app.py:18-19,28-29 add and serialize created_at/updated_at, which the task did not require.
suggestion: No action; noted as an enhancement, not a deduction.
